sections.title: If the player has less than 60% Shayzien favour

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: Don't expect me to deal with the likes of you.

sections.title: If the player has less than 60% Shayzien favour and 20 Defence

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: If you're planning on fighting me for a set of my armour, I'm afraid I'm not interested. The combat XP from fighting you isn't worthwhile. Get a Defence level of 20 first.

sections.title: If the player has 60% Shayzien favour and 20 Defence

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: Hello. Do you fancy a fight? It's just a bit of fun, so I can practice melee combat. I'll give you a piece of my armour if you win.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I reckon I can take you. Did you just say you wanted to practice melee combat in particular?

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: Yes, I'm not interested in fancy magicks. We leave that namby-pamby stuff to the Arceuus weirdos. And no ranging either. We'll fight just with melee.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: Remember, if you lose, you'll probably drop some items, and you probably won't get them back again. Just run away if you want to stop the fight.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I understand. Let's fight.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: To the arena!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's forget about fighting for now.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: In that case you probably shouldn't be hanging around an army camp.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: Let me know if you change your mind. I need combat practice if I'm ever going to level up.

sections.title: If the player does not have the full set of tier 1 armour

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: Fancy another fight? The combat practice is good for me. I'll give you some more of my armour if you win.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sure, let's fight.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: To the arena!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: Let me know if you change your mind. The combat practice is good for me.

sections.title: If the player has the full set of tier 1 armour

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: Don't you already have a set of my armour?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's fight again - I don't mind duplicates.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: To the arena!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, I guess I needn't fight you again.

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: I'll be here if you ever change your mind.

sections.title: If talked to whilst fighting another soldier

lines.speaker: Soldier (tier 1)
lines.text: Focus on your fight!
